feed.title: cocallaw
feed.subtitle: A collection of technical tinkerings and experiments with the cloud

entry.title: Introducing KQL-ADX-Expert: A GitHub Copilot Skill for Kusto Query Language

link.title: Introducing KQL-ADX-Expert: A GitHub Copilot Skill for Kusto Query Language

entry.summary: Introducing KQL-ADX-Expert — a GitHub Copilot CLI skill that writes, optimizes, and runs KQL queries across Azure Data Explorer, Azure Monitor, Sentinel, and 12+ Azure resource types, complete with a Python CLI tool for live cluster interaction.

entry.title: Proactively Monitor Azure Service Retirements with AzRetirementMonitor

link.title: Proactively Monitor Azure Service Retirements with AzRetirementMonitor

entry.summary: Learn how to proactively monitor Azure service retirements across multiple subscriptions using the AzRetirementMonitor PowerShell module, helping you avoid disruptions and maintain compliance.

entry.title: Streamlining Azure CLI & PowerShell Authentication on Windows 11

link.title: Streamlining Azure CLI & PowerShell Authentication on Windows 11

entry.summary: Set up a secure and convenient Azure authentication workflow on a Windows 11 machine using Windows Credential Manager and PowerShell profiles.

entry.title: Automating Let's Encrypt SSL Certificates on Synology DSM with acme.sh and Cloudflare DNS

link.title: Automating Let's Encrypt SSL Certificates on Synology DSM with acme.sh and Cloudflare DNS

entry.summary: How to automate Let's Encrypt SSL certificate issuance and renewal on Synology DSM using acme.sh with Cloudflare DNS.

entry.title: Deploying AVD and retrieving the Registration Token with Bicep

link.title: Deploying AVD and retrieving the Registration Token with Bicep

entry.summary: Learn how to deploy AVD resources using Azure Bicep and retrieve the Host Pool registration token during the deployment to simplify the process.
